candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the external regime confirmation drops to internal-only (TV signals=0) AND consensus conviction is below 33% on every pair, the day is a structural NO_TRADE — forcing entries here harvests noise, not edge.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: When TradingView has zero corroborating signals, the only directional vote comes from the internal MOMENTUM read, which the briefing itself flags as an INPUT for sizing, not a trade signal. With consensus conviction <33% the 30-indicator panel is internally contradicting (e.g. EURUSD 5 bull/5 bear, conv=0%), meaning institutional order flow has not yet committed a direction. Entering on uncommitted flow means trading against the eventual liquidity sweep rather than with it — the CONCENTRATION/FRAGILE regime in the briefing makes any directional move more likely to reverse.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if tv_signal_count == 0 and max(pair.conviction for pair in consensus) < 0.33: return RegimeVeto('NO_TRADE_uncommitted_flow')
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Drawdown reduction and Sharpe uplift via variance suppression — avoiding ~negative-expectancy noise days should lift Sharpe toward target by removing low-quality trades from the denominator; estimate +0.01–0.03 Sharpe.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: 7 consecutive zero-trade days (2026-06-11 through 2026-06-17) coincide with consensus conviction maxing at 42% (USDJPY) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% across ALL pairs, plus the briefing's explicit 'NO_TRADE_TODAY' forex call — the system is already implicitly avoiding these days; this lesson codifies the gate rather than relying on incidental silence.

retirement_flag.reason: Pair-specific half-lives (GBPUSD 6d, AUDUSD 5d, etc.) were calibrated in a prior regime; with 7 days of zero trades there is no fresh evidence these hold periods still hold, and CONCENTRATION/FRAGILE regime may compress momentum half-lives — worth a re-validation flag, not yet retirement.

reflection.system_health_note: System is in a healthy self-imposed freeze — 7 days zero trades aligns with UNKNOWN regime, NO_TRADE briefing, and zero TV confirmation; the gap-closing risk is forcing trades into uncommitted flow rather than waiting for the L1 exact setup.
